brand.name: CodeToWork
brand.slogan: From Code to Career, Pinpoint Your Future
brand.copyright: CodeToWork — Not just matching what you know, but helping you discover possibilities you never imagined

home.heroSubtitle: From code to career, find the right path for you
home.featuresSubtitle: AI-powered tools to boost your career development
home.configBanner: Please configure a model to use platform features
home.configBannerDesc: You haven't set up your AI model configuration yet.
home.loginBanner: Log in to access all features
home.startAssessment: Complete an AI assessment to start your career exploration journey

assessment.title: AI Career Assessment
assessment.desc: Through natural conversation, AI comprehensively analyzes your personality, abilities, interests, and values

matching.title: Smart Job Matching
matching.desc: Using vector similarity and AI deep scoring to recommend the best-fit positions for you

interview.title: AI Mock Interview
interview.desc: AI interviewer for target positions with real-time conversation practice and detailed evaluation reports

career.title: Career Planning
career.desc: AI-customized short, mid, and long-term career goals based on your profile and matching results

resume.title: AI Resume Analysis
resume.desc: Upload your resume for a detailed AI analysis report to help you identify areas for improvement

quiz.title: Smart Quiz Practice
quiz.desc: AI-powered question generation and grading with a spaced repetition system for effective learning

home.loginRequiredDesc: Log in to access assessment, matching, quiz, and all other features.

home.uploadResumeHint: Please click the "Upload Resume" button in the header
